title: GALAX PRO Hammer Drill, 600W Electic Corded Drill, 13mm Metal Chuck, 0-3000RPM, Powerful Variable Speed for Drilling in Wood, Soft Metals
features: High efficient:600W pure copper motor generates more power and provides added durability as well as overload production for drilling in steel, concrete and other hard materials

Speed adjustable:speed setting knob and variable speed trigger allow you to control drilling speed at 0 ~ 3000 RPM; contoured handle perfectly conforms to your hands and reduces hand fatigue. Variable speed allows for precise hole placement on work surface
2 Models:Following your task, change the button on the top to choose drilling functions and hammer, drill and hammer drill models for wood, steel or masonry applications

Lightweight and Convience:Lightweight at 1.9kgs for greater ease of use and maneuverability, Lock-on button provides easier control during continuous use operation; Forward and Backward pushrod brings the flexible operation
Package Includes:1* GALAX PRO Electric Power Drill, 1* side handle attachment, 1* chuck key, 1* Depth Gauge, 1* User Manual
description: Product Description GALAX PRO team specializing in the production of power tools, such as a circular saw, mini circular saw, polisher, hammer drill and so on. If you are a DIY lover, GALAX PRO is your right choice. Adaptation Diversification of 2 Modes The hammer drill and drill modes provide versatility for drilling into the metal, wood, concrete, brick, block and other masonry materials. Speed adjustment Variable speed trigger with a dial for precise operation allows for precise hole placement on work surface. Easier and safer operation Forward and Reverse ability for easy adjustment according to tasks. 360° side handle with depth rod offers greater control, versatility, and increased depth accuracy. Adapt to most chucks The 13mm Keyed chuck is great for a larger bit to tackle demanding projects.
